title: Job Token Management
description: The 'security/token' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture manages job tokens via JobTokenSecretManager.java and JobTokenSelector.java. JobTokenSecretManager.java, as a SecretManager, creates, stores, and retrieves job token secrets, maintaining a cache in a TreeMap. JobTokenSelector.java, as a TokenSelector, finds and returns the first matching job token from a set, checking for JobTokenIdentifier.KIND_NAME and service match. Both components collaborate, ensuring secure and efficient job token management, following Secret Manager and Token Selector patterns.
